summary: Iteration 64: Internal Profitability Dashboard Widget - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend profitability endpoint working. Frontend widget verified on Owner Dashboard with all features functional.

BACKEND_PROFITABILITY_ENDPOINT.GET_profitability_this_month: PASS - Returns per-branch revenue, cost, profit data
BACKEND_PROFITABILITY_ENDPOINT.GET_profitability_last_month: PASS - Returns empty branches array when no data
BACKEND_PROFITABILITY_ENDPOINT.totals_structure: PASS - Returns revenue, cost, net, invoice_count
BACKEND_PROFITABILITY_ENDPOINT.branch_data_structure: PASS - Returns branch_id, branch_name, revenue, cost, profit, invoice_count
BACKEND_PROFITABILITY_ENDPOINT.branches_sorted_by_profit: PASS - Branches sorted by profit descending
BACKEND_PROFITABILITY_ENDPOINT.net_zero_internal: PASS - Net = 0 at company level for internal transfers

FRONTEND_WIDGET.bar_chart: PASS - Green bar for profit center (Main Branch), red bar for cost center (IPIL)
FRONTEND_WIDGET.branch_ranking: PASS - Shows Main Branch +₱1,340.00, IPIL BRANCH -₱1,340.00
FRONTEND_WIDGET.period_selector: PASS - This Month, Last Month, Quarter, Year options working
FRONTEND_WIDGET.period_changes_data: PASS - Last Month shows 'No internal transfers this period'

DASHBOARD_LAYOUT.widget_position: PASS - Positioned at y:35, w:6, h:10 in lg breakpoint

critical_code_review_comments: Profitability endpoint correctly aggregates revenue (supplied) and cost (received) per branch
Net at company level correctly shows ₱0 for internal transfers (revenue = cost)
Period filter properly calculates date ranges for this_month, last_month, quarter, year
Widget correctly shows empty state 'No internal transfers this period' when no data
Bar chart uses green (#059669) for profit and red (#dc2626) for loss
Branch ranking shows revenue - cost = profit calculation inline
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing 4 internal invoices from Main Branch → IPIL BRANCH.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 64 verified Internal Profitability Dashboard Widget. Widget shows on Owner Dashboard with summary row (Revenue, Cost, Net), bar chart (green=profit, red=loss), and branch ranking. Period selector filters data correctly. 'View all invoices' navigates to /internal-invoices. Backend profitability endpoint returns per-branch aggregation with revenue (supplied to others) and cost (received from others). Current data: Main Branch is profit center (+₱1,340), IPIL BRANCH is cost center (-₱1,340), Net = ₱0. No mocked APIs.
